pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires saving the world to this path, and export scripts expect it here.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the base joint minStop to -1.5708.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the base joint maxStop to 1.5708.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the base motor maxVelocity to 1.57.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the shoulder joint minStop to -0.7854.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the shoulder joint maxStop to 1.5708.
Task description explicitly instructs setting the shoulder motor maxVelocity to 1.57.
Verifier logic checks floating point values against this tolerance margin.
Task description directly defines the agent's role as an Automation Safety Engineer.
Task description provides the scenario context of deploying a collaborative robot at a workstation shared with human operators.

privileged_info_summary: The task is fully synthetic and dynamic. The initial Webots world is generated via setup_task.sh. All expected safety limit parameters (base_min_stop: -1.5708, base_max_stop: 1.5708, base_max_vel: 1.57, shoulder_min_stop: -0.7854, shoulder_max_stop: 1.5708, shoulder_max_vel: 1.57) and the output path (/home/ga/Desktop/safe_cobot.wbt) are explicitly listed in the task description instructions and perfectly match the verifier.py logic.
